decks.name: Python Essentials
decks.description: The Python you use every day: built-ins, strings, lists, dicts, comprehensions, functions, exceptions, classes, and the standard library, plus the classic gotchas that trip people up in interviews and code review.

decks.name: UNIX Terminal Essentials
decks.description: The commands a programmer actually types every day: navigating, viewing, searching, pipes and redirection, processes, permissions, networking, and archives, plus the classic traps (rm has no undo, > overwrites, kill -9, uniq needs sort).
